current_desc: Currency of the deposit amount. 1=USD, 2=EUR, 3=GBP, etc. (Tier 1 — Billing.Deposit)
Current deposit status. Key values: 1=New, 2=Approved, 3=Decline, 5=InProcess, 11=Chargeback, 12=Refund, 13=Pending, 35=DeclineByRRE. (Tier 1 — Billing.Deposit)

Result of the pre-processing risk management check. 69 distinct risk reason codes. NULL=no risk check recorded. Key codes: 1=Success, 35=KYCLevel3, 47=ML, 49=CustomerToFundingViolation. (Tier 1 — Billing.Deposit)
Primary key identifying the payment state. 1=Pending, 2=InProcess, 3=Processed, 4=Canceled, 5=Failed, 6=Reversed, 7=CompletedExternally. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.PaymentStatus)

claimed_pairs: 0=None; 1=Visa; 2=Master Card; 3=Diners; 4=Amex; 5=Fire Pay; 6=JCB; 7=American Express; 8=Maestro; 9=Laser; 10=Switch; 11=UK Local Credit Card; 12=Discover; 13=Local Card; 14=China Union Pay; 15=Solo; 16=Cirrus; 17=GE Capital
